nasb.text: The kings of the earth take their stand And the rulers take counsel together Against the Lord and against His Anointed, saying,

esv.text: The kings of the earth set themselves, and the rulers take counsel together, against the Lord and against his Anointed, saying,

cnv.text: 世上的君王起來， 首領聚在一起， 敵對耶和華和他所膏立的，說：

ccb.text: 世上的君王一同行动， 官长聚集商议， 要抵挡耶和华和祂所膏立的王。

csbs.text: 地上的君王们站出来，首领们一同商定， 敌对耶和华和他的受膏者，说：
